title: Matilda's Walk Report
text:
## Walk Report

**Dog:** Matilda (dark red golden retriever)

**Weather:** {adjective} with a chance of {plural noun}.

**Route:** Left on {adjective} Street, past the {adjective} park, then home for {adjective} treats.

**Highlights:** Matilda {past-tense verb} at a {adjective} squirrel and made {number} new friends.

**Lowlights:** She rolled in something {adjective} near a {place}.

**Equipment:** {adjective} leash, {adjective} bag, one heroic {object}.

**Owner mood:** {adjective}.

**Recommendation:** More walks, fewer {plural noun} distractions.
